## What does this PR do?

Summarise the change clearly. Link to the issue it addresses if there is one.

Closes # (issue number)

---

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Curriculum content — new or revised
- [ ] Design asset — illustration, animation, icon
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor — no behaviour change, just cleaner code
- [ ] Something else

---

## For code changes — checklist

- [ ] I've read [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) and this change fits the project structure
- [ ] New code follows the naming conventions in ARCHITECTURE.md
- [ ] I've added tests for new logic
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`flutter test`)
- [ ] I've tested on a low-end device or low-RAM emulator (not just a high-spec machine)
- [ ] No synchronous Firestore reads in the UI layer
- [ ] Images are compressed (illustrations max 200KB, icons max 10KB)
- [ ] No hardcoded strings — all user-facing text is in the translation files

---

## For curriculum changes — checklist

- [ ] I've read [CURRICULUM.md](../CURRICULUM.md) and understand where this content fits
- [ ] The change is consistent with LUMIO's assessment philosophy (mastery-based, no punitive language)
- [ ] If the change involves factual content, it's supported by credible sources (link them below)
- [ ] If the change involves child safety content, I've noted this clearly — it requires specialist review
- [ ] English and Bengali versions are both included (or I've noted which translations are still needed)

---

## For design changes — checklist

- [ ] I've read [DESIGN_GUIDE.md](../DESIGN_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] Colours are from the LUMIO palette
- [ ] Typography uses Nunito (headlines) and Inter (body)
- [ ] Lottie files are under 50KB
- [ ] Illustrations follow the diversity and cultural sensitivity guidelines
- [ ] LUMI's character is consistent with the established personality

---

## How to test this

Tell reviewers exactly how to verify the change works. Steps, screenshots, or a short screen recording if relevant.

---

## Screenshots / recording (if applicable)

Before and after, or a demonstration of what's new.

---

## Anything else the reviewer should know?

Trade-offs you made, things you're uncertain about, follow-up work this opens up.
